mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM ( room_id, room_type, festival_id, owner_id, room_title, room_description, free_location, free_date, max_capacity, created_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, 'GROUP', #{festivalId}, #{ownerId}, #{roomTitle}, #{roomDescription}, #{freeLocation}, #{freeDate}, #{maxCapacity}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM_USER ( seq, room_id, member_id, joined_at, last_read_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAT_ROOM_USER.NEXTVAL, #{roomId}, #{memberId}, SYSDATE, SYSTIMESTAMP )
